title: Distributed Research Knowledge Architecture
description:
Design a system for accumulating and synthesizing knowledge from web research across sessions. Tasks include:
1. Create a research database for storing web search results
2. Build tagging and categorization system for research topics
3. Implement cross-session research threads that accumulate findings
4. Develop synthesis tools that combine findings from multiple searches
5. Create "living documents" that auto-update with new research
6. Build knowledge graphs connecting related discoveries

This enables sustained intellectual inquiry that compounds over time rather than ephemeral searches.
